member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions
member.summary: Configuration for Easebuzz payment gateway. Bind to "Easebuzz" in appsettings.json. Key and Salt are obtained from the Easebuzz merchant dashboard (https://dashboard.easebuzz.in). Do not commit Key/Salt; use User Secrets, environment variables, or Key Vault in production.

member.name: F:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.Section
member.summary: Configuration section name for appsettings.json.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.Key
member.summary: Merchant key from Easebuzz dashboard.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.Salt
member.summary: Merchant salt from Easebuzz dashboard. Never send to client; used server-side only for hash generation.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.Sandbox
member.summary: Use sandbox/test environment when true; production when false.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.EnableIframe
member.summary: Enable iframe payment flow when true.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Optional override for API base URL. When null, derived from Sandbox (test vs production).

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP timeout for Easebuzz API calls in seconds.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Tyresoles.Easebuzz services in the DI container.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEasebuzz(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzOptions})
member.summary: Registers Easebuzz payment gateway services. Binds configuration from "Easebuzz" section. Key and Salt must be set (from Easebuzz dashboard); validation runs at startup.
member.example: In Program.cs: builder.Services.AddEasebuzz(); Or: builder.Services.AddEasebuzz(o => o.Sandbox = true);

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.EasebuzzUrls
member.summary: Easebuzz API base URLs. Confirm from https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/ if endpoints change.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Hash.EasebuzzHashProvider
member.summary: SHA-512 hash for Easebuzz request signing. Stateless and thread-safe. Field order per Easebuzz/PayU-style: key|txnid|amount|productinfo|firstname|email|||||||||||SALT Confirm from https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Hash.IEasebuzzHashProvider
member.summary: Stateless, thread-safe provider for Easebuzz request hash (SHA-512). Salt is never exposed; used only when computing the hash server-side.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Hash.IEasebuzzHashProvider.ComputeInitiatePaymentHash(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes the payment initiation hash. Field order must match Easebuzz docs. See https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/ (Initiate Payment API). Formula: sha512(key|txnid|amount|productinfo|firstname|email|||||||||||salt).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Http.EasebuzzPaymentClient
member.summary: Typed HTTP client for Easebuzz Initiate Payment and Transaction APIs. Endpoint paths per https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Http.IEasebuzzPaymentClient
member.summary: Typed HTTP client for Easebuzz payment APIs. Used by IEasebuzzPaymentService.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Http.IEasebuzzPaymentClient.InitiatePaymentAsync(Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: POST to initiate payment; returns result containing access_key or data.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Http.IEasebuzzPaymentClient.GetTransactionStatusAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches transaction status by transaction ID or reference.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.IEasebuzzPaymentService
member.summary: High-level Easebuzz payment service. Inject this where you need to initiate payments or check transaction status.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.IEasebuzzPaymentService.InitiatePaymentAsync(Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentInput,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initiates a payment: computes hash server-side and calls Easebuzz API; returns result with access_key for payment UI.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.IEasebuzzPaymentService.GetTransactionStatusAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches transaction status by transaction ID or reference. Returns null if not found or on error.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.IEasebuzzPaymentService.VerifyWebhookSignature(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies webhook signature (hash) against payload. Use when processing Easebuzz callbacks. Confirm verification algorithm from https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentInput
member.summary: Input for initiating a payment. Hash is computed by the service; do not pass Key/Salt from client.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentRequest
member.summary: Request to initiate a payment. Field names aligned with Easebuzz Initiate Payment API where applicable. See https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentRequest.Hash
member.summary: Hash generated server-side (key|txnid|amount|productinfo|firstname|email|...|salt). Never send salt to client.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.InitiatePaymentResult
member.summary: Response from Easebuzz Initiate Payment API. Contains access_key used to open payment UI.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Models.TransactionStatusResult
member.summary: Transaction status from Easebuzz Transaction API. Confirm field names from https://docs.easebuzz.in/docs/payment-gateway/

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Easebuzz.Services.EasebuzzPaymentService
member.summary: Easebuzz payment service: initiates payments (with server-side hash) and fetches transaction status.
